writeRemediationArtifact.signature: writeRemediationArtifact(setName: string, remediation: { scope: string, files: string[], deps: string[], severity: string, source: string }): void
writeRemediationArtifact.description: Writes a structured JSON artifact to .planning/pending-sets/{set-name}.json for later consumption by add-set

readRemediationArtifact.description: Reads a pending-sets artifact if it exists, returns null otherwise

listPendingRemediations.description: Lists all pending remediation set names from .planning/pending-sets/

deleteRemediationArtifact.description: Removes a pending-sets artifact after it has been consumed by add-set

survivesClear.description: Remediation artifacts persist on disk in .planning/pending-sets/ and survive /clear context resets

gracefulFallback.description: add-set falls through to standard interactive discovery when no remediation artifact exists (fs.existsSync guard clause)

noStateMutation.description: Remediation artifacts operate outside STATE.json -- no schema migration, no Zod changes, no withStateTransaction

definition.scope: Design and implement the REMEDIATION artifact for audit-to-set handoff. Audit-version writes structured context to .planning/pending-sets/. Add-set auto-discovers and pre-populates scope. Status displays pending sets. Update Node.js minimum version references.

tasks.description: Create remediation.cjs module with write/read/list/delete functions
Wire remediation artifact writer into audit-version skill
tasks.acceptance: After audit produces remediation suggestions, artifacts are written to disk

tasks.description: Wire remediation artifact reader into add-set skill with fallback
tasks.acceptance: add-set pre-populates from artifact when present, falls through to interactive when absent

tasks.description: Add pending remediation display to status skill
tasks.acceptance: Status output shows pending remediation sets count and names

tasks.description: Synchronize Node.js minimum version to >=22 across package.json, setup.sh, README badge
Add unit tests for remediation module
tasks.acceptance: Tests cover write/read/list/delete and edge cases
